Paarl Royals Knock Out Joburg Super Kings in Dominant SA20 Eliminator Win

Jan 23, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

Paarl Royals Knock Out Joburg Super Kings in Dominant SA20 Eliminator Win

Paarl Royals Knock Out Joburg Super Kings with a commanding all-round performance to secure a 36-run victory in the SA20 Eliminator, keeping their title hopes alive. Powered by crucial contributions from Lhuan-dre Pretorius and Hardus Viljoen, the Royals produced a clinical display under pressure to advance to Qualifier 2.

You can read the full original article on 8jjsports.com here:
👉 Paarl Royals Knock Out Joburg Super Kings in Dominant SA20 Eliminator Win
